blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,036 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
